name: Tetramisole + Oxyclozanide (Veterinary) | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: This is a broad spectrum anthelmintic. It is active against liver fluke, roundworm, lungworm, whipworm, Paramphistomum spp., Moniezia spp., etc. in livestock.
description: Tetramisole causes the neuromuscular paralysis of the worms & expels from host within 24 hours. Oxyclozanide inhibits oxidative phosphorylation of worms rendering destruction of metabolic processes resulting in death of worms.
dosage__administration: For oral administration only Administer 1 bolus/100-150 kg body weight. This bolus may be administered with water or with feed (like molasses) or wrapping with banana-leaf directly. Or, as directed by the registered Veterinary physician.
contraindications: Do not administer during the first 3 (three) months of pregnancy.
side_effects: No side effect is observed at the recommended dosage.
precautions__warnings: Provide sufficient drinking water to the animal after administration of this preparation.Withdrawal Period: Meat- 14 days, Milk- 4 days.
storage_conditions: Store in a cool and dry places, protected from light. Keep all medicines out of reach of children.
